action.reasoning: Observation: The current TTA-capable predict.py, even after reverting the argparse default to center, still scores only ~0.063 on hidden test, while the original simple feature-head predictor with checkpoints_features_stable/best.pt achieved the experiment best macro_f1=0.1749. Analysis: The later TTA rewrite changed the center preprocessing path (likely short-side resize + crop instead of the square resize used for cached-feature training), so simply changing the default was insufficient. Decision: Restore a minimal, deterministic feature-head prediction script using CLIP-B, square 224x224 resize, normalized feature extraction, saved bias_tau/class_bias support, and submit the known best stable checkpoint.
